zh.Wrinehill, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾萊內爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellin Haukeston於1373年出生在英國爾時，她的父親John Hawkstone40歲，母親Annabella Bromley28歲。她於1395年12月與William de Egerton在英國爾維布波瑞結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1425年12月在她的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.Wrinehill, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾萊內爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellin Haukeston于1373年出生在英国爾时，她的父亲John Hawkstone40岁，母亲Annabella Bromley28岁。她于1395年12月与William de Egerton在英国爾維布波瑞结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1425年12月在她的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ellin
meanings: Some consider this the same as Helen, and indeed in Spanish Helen and Ellen are both represented by Elena. A correspondent of Notes and Queries says the name Ellen has no possible connexion with Helen, which is older by a thousand years at least, and that Ellen is the feminine of Alain, Alan, or Allan. It may, however, be the same as Ailean. Ellin, another spelling of Ellen.

variants.name: Helen
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

variants.name: Elena
meanings: form of   Helen  , now used quite frequently in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellin Haukeston was born in 1373, in Cheshire, England, her father, John Hawkstone, was 40 and her mother, Annabella Bromley, was 28. She married William de Egerton in December 1395, in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in December 1425, in her hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellin Haukeston est née en 1373, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Hawkstone, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Annabella Bromley, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William d’Egerton en décembre 1395, à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en décembre 1425, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellin Haukeston 1373 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Hawkstone 40 und ihre Mutter Annabella Bromley 28. Sie hat im Dezember 1395 in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England William de Egerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb im Dezember 1425 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellin Haukeston è nata il nel 1373 nel Cheshire, England, sua padre, John Hawkstone, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Annabella Bromley, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato William de Egerton nel dicembre 1395, nel Wybunbury, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel dicembre 1425, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellin Haukestonが1373年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Hawkstoneは40歳，母Annabella Bromleyは28歳であった。1395年12月にイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーでWilliam de Egertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1425年12月に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellin Haukeston(이)가 1373년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hawkstone(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annabella Bromley(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1395년 12월 영국 체실르 윈이버버이에서 William de Egerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 12월 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Wrinehill, Staffordshire, England: Wrinehill, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellin Haukeston nasceu em 1373, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hawkstone, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Annabella Bromley, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Egerton em dezembro de 1395, em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em dezembro de 1425, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellin Haukeston родилась в 1373 г. в местности чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Hawkstone было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Annabella Bromley, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Egerton декабрь 1395 г. в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла декабрь 1425 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellin Haukeston nació en 1373, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Hawkstone, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Annabella Bromley, tenía 28 años. Se casó con William de Egerton en diciembre de 1395, en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en diciembre de 1425, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
